storyboard_markdown:
# Scene Contract: CH023_SC002

## Production Intent
The sequence must emphasize the extreme verticality of the thousand-foot Zodanga barracks to establish John Carter's physical prowess. Production must manage high-altitude practical or VFX elements to ensure the scale is visceral, transitioning from the shadowed climb to the exposed roof environment.

## Required Cast
- john_carter (Rugged frontiersman/Martian warrior)
- Zodangan Sentry

## Required Environments
- The exterior/roof of the Zodanga Barracks

## Continuity Constraints
- Grappling hook placement and tension
- Height/altitude perception consistency
- Lighting transition from shadow to roof exposure

## Beat List
- BT001: Carter initiates a perilous climb up the thousand-foot Zodanga barracks using a grappling hook.
- BT002: Carter reaches the roof of the barracks.
- BT003: Carter neutralizes a Zodangan Sentry.
- BT004: Carter secures two air machines for his escape.
